title: Cosmic's Pure FPS
description: Tired of modpacks that dont give good performance on forge.
body:
# Pure Fps Without Extra Mods?
  Cosmic's Pure FPS promises huge performance on forge. It is one of the best modpacks for optimization, so you can get the ultimate performace. If your someone who need some optimization on forge, then this is for you!
 
  **Im am using a GTX 1650 and Intel Core i5**
  ![Modpack Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/154026c6fa8dd050fcabd154732e7c24031bb49b.png)
